app.title: LanCopy — Local network transfer
tip.myip: Your IP on the local network. Give it to the other PC to connect.
tip.copyip: Copy my IP to the clipboard
tip.localport: TCP port this PC listens on. Change it and press Enter (or the button) to restart the server. Both PCs must match.
tip.applyport: Apply the new local port and restart the server.
tip.peers: PCs discovered automatically on the network. Select one to auto-fill IP/port.
tip.remoteip: IP of the other PC (e.g. 192.168.1.25). Press Enter or click Connect.
tip.remoteport: TCP port (1-65535, default 8742). Both PCs must use the same.
tip.connect: Connect to the remote PC (you can also press Enter in the IP field).
tip.connstatus: Connection status with the remote PC (green = connected).
tip.pinlabel: Optional PIN. If set, the other PC must use the same PIN to connect.
tip.pin: Authentication PIN (leave empty for no PIN)
tip.saveprofile: Save IP/port as a named profile
tip.requireApproval: Ask before accepting each incoming file. Auto-rejects after 60s.
dlg.consent.title: Incoming file
tip.paircode: Copy a short pairing code (share it instead of IP:port)
tip.readOnly: Reject remote writes (put/delete/rename). Sharing stays safe from modification.
tip.tls: Encrypt the connection with TLS (both ends must have it enabled)
tip.shareRoot: Confine remote peers to the shared folder only (recommended). Uncheck to expose the whole disk.
tip.compress: Compress files in transit (Deflate, max 200 MB)
tip.thispc: Files on this computer. Select and press Send to transfer them to the remote.
tip.localfilter: Filter the local list by name (updates as you type).
sort.name: Name ⇅
tip.locallist: Local files. Double-click opens folder; right-click = more actions; drag to the remote panel to send.
tip.ctxsend: Send the selected file(s) to the remote PC.
tip.ctxverifyremote: Compare the local file hash with its copy on the remote.
tip.ctxcopypath: Copy the full file path to the clipboard.
tip.send: Send files/folders to the remote. Ctrl+click multiple, Ctrl+A all. You can also drag.
tip.receive: Receive files/folders from the remote. Ctrl+click multiple, Ctrl+A all. You can also drag.
tip.synctoremote: Sync local folder → remote (only different files)
tip.synctolocal: Sync remote folder → local (only different files)
tip.watch: Watch local folder and auto-send changes to the remote
tip.remotepc: Files on the connected remote PC. Select and press Receive to bring them over.
tip.remoteup: Go to the parent folder (remote PC)
tip.remotehome: Back to the remote PC drive list
tip.ctxreceivelocal: Bring the selected file(s) from the remote to this PC.
tip.ctxverifylocal: Compare the remote file hash with its local copy.
status.ready: Ready. Share your IP with the other PC to connect.
tip.status: Status messages and details of the current operation.
tip.history: History of transfers completed in this session.
dlg.overwrite.title: Confirm overwrite
dlg.overwrite.many: {0} files already exist at the destination.
dlg.rename.title: Rename
st.serverActive: Server active at {0}  —  give this IP to the other PC
st.connectFirst: Connect to the other PC first
st.selectRemote: Select files/folders in the remote panel
st.localPortInvalid: Invalid local port. Use a value between 1 and 65535.
st.alreadyListening: The server is already listening on port {0}.
st.connectBeforeDrag: Connect to the remote PC before dragging files
tip.remotelist: Remote PC files. Double-click opens folder; right-click = more actions; drag to the local panel to receive.
tip.progress: Progress of the current transfer (send or receive).
st.deleteCancelledRemote: Remote delete cancelled by hard confirmation
st.navRemoteFirst: Navigate to a remote folder first
st.navLocalFirst: Navigate to a local folder first
dlg.hard.title: Hard confirmation
dlg.profile.title: Save profile
tip.sendtext: Send a short text to the remote (copied to its clipboard)
tip.pastelink: Paste a lancopy:// link or ip:port to fill the connection
tip.broadcast: Send the selected files to all discovered peers
tip.sendto: Create a Windows "Send to" shortcut for LanCopy
qr.title: Pairing QR
bw.label: Limit:
st.sendtoDone: Added to the Windows "Send to" menu
st.sendtoReady: {0} file(s) ready — connect and press Send
